title: Neatly
description: A fast, modern tool to beautify (unminify) and minify JavaScript, CSS, HTML, JSON, and XML — paste, drop a file, and get clean or compact code instantly.
longDescription: Neatly is a free online developer tool to beautify (unminify) and minify JavaScript, CSS, HTML, JSON, and XML. Paste your code or drop a file, pick a mode, and get clean, readable — or compact — output in a click.
highlights: Supports JS, CSS, HTML, JSON & XML
Paste code or drop a file

title: Dibiku
description: A fast database client with a built-in SSH terminal & SQL editor. Connect to MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, and SQLite from one blazing-fast app.
longDescription: Dibiku is a fast, all-in-one database client with a built-in SSH terminal and a multi-tab SQL editor. It connects to MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, and SQLite from a single app, with SSH tunnels and 36+ keyboard shortcuts for a keyboard-first workflow.
highlights: Connects to MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis & SQLite

title: PRIDE Community
description: Official site for PRIDE — a motorcycle riders community in Cimahi built around brotherhood, safety, and respect. "More Than A Ride."
longDescription: The official web presence for PRIDE (Permata Riders Independent & Dedicated Enthusiast), a motorcycle community in Cimahi. The site captures the community's identity around brotherhood, safety, and respect through bold branding and a story-driven landing page.
